8BITMOVEMENT.GM-Mode_hint: When ticked only the GM is able to make changes to the walking images.
8BITMOVEMENT.activate: Activate 8bit walk style for this token.
8BITMOVEMENT.Settings-Mode_hint: With this setting on the setup of the token can be done via the token Settings
8BITMOVEMENT.Auto-Activate_hint: When ticked the 8bit walk style is activated automatically on newly placed tokens, no manual activation needed.
8BITMOVEMENT.Diagonal-Mode_hint: Enable this mode to configure and use all 8 movement directions from the Token Config appearance tab, if you have images for them.
8BITMOVEMENT.Warn.No_Images: No directional images found for this token, please upload directional images first.
8BITMOVEMENT.Warn.No_Images_Diagonal: No diagonal images found for this token, please upload diagonal images first.
8BITMOVEMENT.Settings-Warn_hint: When ticked the warning notification for missing images will be disabled.
8BITMOVEMENT.Disable-Rotation-Animation_: When ticked the rotation animation will be disabled.
8BITMOVEMENT.Disable-Selection-Border_hi: When ticked the orange selection/hover border is hidden on tokens that have 8bit walk style configured.
